channel.title: Bibtex on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes
channel.description: Recent content in Bibtex on Jan de Muijnck-Hughes

item.title: Some BibLaTeX Tricks to remember
item.description: For creating beautiful PDFs and slides, I am a big believer of using LaTeX whenever possible. Sometimes one has to use Word, but for everything else LaTeX! For writing documents, that is another matter. When working with citations, LaTeX is bundled with a powerful tool called BibTeX that supports structured representation of bibliographic entries in a custom format that allows one to easily change citation style and reference style. Now, BibTeX is rather outdated and the community has produced a tidy replacement called BibLaTeX that uses biber as a backend rather than BibTeX.
